s: Companion app for Gadgetbridge, to allow for controlled Internet access
d:
This app provides an interface to Gadgetbridge for HTTP/FTP transfers and WiFi control. It functions mostly like a low-level proxy. Gadgetbridge is in control of what is requested and what is shared.
It uses a "dangerous permission" for making sure the Gadgetbridge user makes an explicit decision to allow/disallow usage of this helper.
